mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT car_id) FROM app_auction_bid_log WHERE (user_id = #{id} AND valid = '0')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t1.car_id) FROM app_auction_bid_log t1 left join app_auction t2 on t1.car_id=t2.id left join app_auction_bail_log t3 on t1.car_id=t3.car_id and t3.user_id=#{userId} WHERE (t1.user_id = #{userId} AND t1.valid = #{zero}) and t2.car_state=7 and t3.out_trade_no is null
